testcase.name: login

error.message: Error communicating with the remote browser. It may have died. Build info: version: '4.8.1', revision: '8ebccac989' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '1.8.0_251' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [18cf902509b33e5ea631b943b51b438b, clickElement {id=0e7ce932-ac13-4bd3-9233-9ac3689d6722}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 110.0.5481.178, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 110.0.5481.77 (65ed616c6e8e..., userDataDir: C:\Users\nagae\AppData\Loca...}, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:56891}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: WINDOWS, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:56891/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 110.0.5481.178, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on WINDOWS (18cf902509b33e5ea631b943b51b438b)] -> css selector: a[onclick='window.location.reload()']] Session ID: 18cf902509b33e5ea631b943b51b438b
